name: heliosdb-codekb
description: Token-saving code+docs KB for Claude Code. Tree-sitter LSP queries, GraphRAG section retrieval, cross-modal text→code MENTIONS, time-travel branches, AST diff — all served via MCP over stdio. Powered by HeliosDB-Nano (the embedded PostgreSQL-compatible vector+graph DB) so retrieval rides on ART indexes, BM25, and HNSW instead of file walks.
